TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Victor_Alexander, title = Victor_Alexander, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Victor_Alexander} }

S.FORM: Victor Alexander hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, pzyang pkaki' tay kska', pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 8, Victor Alexander, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Victor Alexander hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, pzyang pkaki' tay kska', pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 8, Victor Alexander, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *iʦ~ʨtor alexan*er ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ, pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *iʦ~ʨtor alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
